report_title: 能力模块化 + 工作流搭建诊断 — Capabilities × Nodes × Marketplace × Visual Editor × Director Studio 全栈盘点
module: anobot-factory / Capability Modularization + Workflow Construction (能力市场 + 节点注册表 + Vue Flow 可视化编辑器 + 三模块导演工作台)
investigated_files: backend/capabilities/capability_manager.py (628 lines, 32KB — 统一能力管理器: OpenClaw 40+ / MCP 50+ / Browser 25+ / Search 10+ / Monitor 15+ / AI 15+ = 150+ Capability 定义 + 依赖 + execute_handler)
backend/capabilities/unified_capabilities.py (6KB — 顶层 unified 入口)
backend/capabilities/__init__.py (1KB)
backend/imdf/nodes/engine.py (417 lines, 16KB — DAG 引擎: 拓扑排序 + cycle detection + port matching + execute)
backend/imdf/nodes/registry.py (562 lines, 33KB — NodeRegistry: 47 节点类型 auto-discover, 3 类别 dimension/capability/function, PortDef/ParamDef/NodeDef)
backend/imdf/nodes/templates.py (380 lines, 13KB — 6 内置 workflow template: t2i_basic / video_pipeline / ppt_auto / ai_prelabel / img_upscale / empty)
backend/imdf/nodes/__init__.py (623B)
backend/services/workflow_service/main.py (140 lines — port 8009 入口, 挂 workflow_router + templates_router + editor_router + dag_v2_router + director_router + legacy_scheduler_router)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag.py (15KB — P3-3-W2 DAG runtime, in-memory store)
backend/services/workflow_service/routes.py (15KB — /api/v1/workflows/* P3-3-W2 路由)
backend/services/workflow_service/templates.py (18KB — WORKFLOW_TEMPLATES 内置 + 用户自定义)
backend/services/workflow_service/templates_routes.py (10KB — /api/v1/workflows/templates/* CRUD)
backend/services/workflow_service/editor_routes.py (771 lines, 26KB — 视频编辑器: 12 transitions + 16 effects + 5 montages + render engine + 协作锁 + 快照 + undo/redo + WS 实时进度)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag_v2/__init__.py (2KB)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag_v2/engine.py (672 lines, 25KB — AdvancedDAGEngine: 7 NodeType + 4 EdgeType + 4 ExecMode + 4 ErrorPolicy + 8 NodeStatus 状态机)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag_v2/operators.py (728 lines, 30KB — Operator Marketplace: 200+ 算子分 9 类别, 含 cleaning/scoring/annotation/filter/export/evaluation/generator/editor/agent)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag_v2/visual.py (11KB — Vue Flow JSON 转换 + auto_layout LR/TB)
backend/services/workflow_service/dag_v2/routes.py (525 lines, 17KB — /api/v1/workflow/dag + /workflow/operators + /workflow/dag/{id}/visual + /import-flow)
backend/services/workflow_service/director/routes.py (3 模块: story → visual → assembly)
frontend-v2/src/views/workflow/VisualEditor.vue (557 lines, 23KB — Vue Flow DAG 画布 + 算子市场侧栏 + 节点配置 + 运行监控 + 右键菜单)
frontend-v2/src/views/workflow/OperatorMarket.vue (96 lines, 4KB — 算子市场卡片网格 + schema 弹窗)
frontend-v2/src/views/workflow/DirectorStudio.vue (132 lines, 5KB — 3 模块导演工作台: brief → shot → visual asset → final cut)
frontend-v2/src/views/workflow/RunMonitor.vue (5KB)
frontend-v2/src/api/workflow_v2.ts (286 lines, 9KB — dag_v2 / director / operator marketplace 完整 TS client)

capability_manager_628_lines.enums: CapabilityType: 30+ (OPENCLAW 6 / MCP 6 / BROWSER 4 / SEARCH 4 / MONITOR 5 / AI 4 + 各种子类型)
capability_manager_628_lines.registry: CapabilityManager 单例: capabilities Dict + capability_index (by type) + capability_index_by_category
registered_categories: OpenClaw 编程 (8): coding_agent / code_generator / code_reviewer / debugger / test_generator / refactor / sql_generator / api_designer
OpenClaw 内容 (8): video_frame / whisper / video_converter / image_resizer / pdf_summarizer / text_summarizer / ocr / youtube_transcript
OpenClaw macOS (5): app_control / file / system / clipboard / notification
OpenClaw 搜索 (4): github_search / web_search / doc_search / stackoverflow
OpenClaw 记忆 (6): memory_save / memory_recall / context_save / context_restore / preference_save / preference_get
OpenClaw 自动化 (6): workflow_create / workflow_execute / schedule_task / email_automation / calendar_automation / self_improving
MCP 数据库 (8): postgres_query / postgres_schema / sqlite_query / sqlite_tables / mysql_query / mongodb_query / postgres_tables / sqlite_schema
MCP 版本控制 (8): git_status / git_log / git_diff / git_branch / git_commit / git_push / git_pull / git_search
(+ 浏览器 25 / 搜索 10 / 监控 15 / AI 15 — 文件后段未读取但 enum 声明齐全)
weakness: execute_handler 都是 None — 全部 capability 仅是 declarative manifest, 没有真实执行
required_apis / required_capabilities / parameters 字段也是空 — 没有真正依赖图
没有路由层 — /api/v1/capabilities/* 端点不存在 (unified_capabilities.py 是 stub)
没接入 Vue Flow / DAG engine — capability 与 nodes/operators 是两套并行的分类系统, 互不引用
created_at 2026-03-08, 3 个多月没更新, 是早期 demo 残留

imdf_nodes_47_node_types.build_dag: 从 { nodes: {id:{id,type,data}}, connections: [{from,fromP,to,toP}] } 构 DAG, 端口命名 'in_0'/'out_0'
validate: 3. Port matching / type checking (warning 不阻断)
imdf_nodes_47_node_types.execute: async DAGEngine.execute(dag, context) — 按 topo order 顺序执行, 调用 NodeDefinition.handler (目前不存在, 仅占位)
node_categories_3: dimension (6 节点): text / image / video / audio / model3d / output
capability (8 节点, 文件前 200 行可见): llm / comfyui / ppt / script / imgedit / upscale / removebg / rmwatermark / topazimg / ...
(+ function 类别, 文件后段未读取)
imdf_nodes_47_node_types.auto_discover: NodeRegistry.initialize() — 一次性注册 47 节点 (声明式, 全部在代码里硬编码)

templates: t2i_basic: text → llm → image → output (基础文生图)
video_pipeline: upload → (videoedit + topazvid) → video → output (视频增强)
ppt_auto: text → (llm + textsplit) → ppt → output (PPT 自动生成)
ai_prelabel: upload → prelabel → output (AI 预标注)
img_upscale: upload → upscale → topazimg → image → output (图片放大)
imdf_node_templates_6_builtin.template_manager: TemplateManager — list/get/add/delete + 禁止删除 builtin

routers: workflow_router (P3-3-W2 /api/v1/workflows/*) — 基础 workflow CRUD + run + list runs
editor_router (P4-6-W1 /api/v1/workflow/editor/*) — 视频编辑器 (12 transitions + 16 effects + 5 montages + render + 协作锁 + 快照 + undo/redo + WS)
dag_v2_router (P4-6-W2 /api/v1/workflow/* singular) — 高级 DAG + 算子市场 + Vue Flow
workflow_service_microservice_8009.multimodal_adapter: build_multimodal_router (6 输入模态 / 3 输出类型)

dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.node_types_7: input / transform / condition / loop / parallel / sub_workflow / output
dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.edge_types_4: data / control / error / retry (control edge 支持 condition 表达式)
dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.error_policies_4: retry (3x) / fallback (跳到 fallback_node_id) / skip (标 SKIPPED) / escalate (FAILED + 终止 run)
dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.run_status_6: pending / running / succeeded / failed / partial / cancelled
dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.persistence: in-memory store (workflow_runs / workflow_run_steps), thread-safe singleton via get_advanced_dag_engine()
dag_v2_advanced_engine_672_lines.websocket: WebSocket-compatible progress callback hook (但 Editor.vue 用的不是 ws, 是 fetch 轮询)

dag_v2_operator_marketplace_728_lines.categories_9: cleaning / scoring / annotation / filter / export / evaluation / generator / editor / agent
dag_v2_operator_marketplace_728_lines.claim: 200+ 算子 (P4-6-W2 文档口径, 文件前 200 行有 _build_cleaning() 32 个 + _build_cleaning_extra 12 = 44 个 cleaning 算子, 总数需读完)
dag_v2_operator_marketplace_728_lines.versioning: semver + 不可变 OperatorVersion + replaces/deprecated 字段

endpoints: POST /api/v1/workflow/dag/import-flow (从 Vue Flow payload 导入)
dag_v2_routes_525_lines.validation: Pydantic 严格校验 (NodeType/EdgeType/ExecMode/ErrorPolicy enum 白名单)

layout_3_cols: LEFT (col-market, 算子市场 200+): 搜索 + 分类 NCascader + NScrollbar 拖拽 + 双击添加
CENTER (col-canvas, Vue Flow DAG 画布): nodes + edges 双向绑定 + Background/MiniMap/Controls
RIGHT (col-config): 节点配置 (id/type/operatorId/name/params JSON/errorPolicy/timeout) 或 Run 状态 (per-step NList)
header_actions: NSelect 选 DAG (dagOptions 来自 listDAGs)
新建 DAG (onCreate → 新建空 DAG)
自动布局 LR (onLayoutLR → 调 recomputeLayout 'LR')
自动布局 TB (onLayoutTB → 调 recomputeLayout 'TB')
workflow_visual_editor_557_lines.drag_drop: op-pill draggable=true + @dragstart onOpDragStart + 双击 onOpDoubleClick 添加
workflow_visual_editor_557_lines.context_menu: NDropdown 右键节点 → 配置/删除/复制/查看 schema
workflow_visual_editor_557_lines.node_config: id (readonly) + type (NTag) + operatorId (monospace) + name (NInput) + params (textarea JSON) + errorPolicy (NSelect) + timeoutSec (NInputNumber 1-3600)
workflow_visual_editor_557_lines.monitor: lastRun.steps 渲染为 NList, 每条 NTag 状态 (succeeded→success / failed→error / 其他→info) + 错误详情

operator_market_page_96_lines.ui: 搜索 + 分类下拉 + 4 列卡片网格 (n-card hoverable) + schema 弹窗 (NModal)
operator_market_page_96_lines.card: header (icon + name) + header-extra (category NTag) + body (description + tags.slice(0,4)) + footer (version + count + 'schema' 按钮)
operator_market_page_96_lines.category_colors: cleaning→success / scoring→warning / annotation→info / editor→error / generator→primary / agent→default / evaluation→success / export→warning

3_modules: Story: NList shots { title, description } + state NTag
director_studio_132_lines.step_orchestration: 全流程 directorRun(brief, shotCount) → session_id → 手动 step by step (onStepStory / onStepVisual / onStepAssembly)

workflow_v2_ts_286_lines.dag_types: NodeType / EdgeType / ExecMode / ErrorPolicy / NodeStatus / RunStatus 完整枚举镜像

world_benchmark_comparison.nanobot_status: VisualEditor.vue 是 1:1 对标 (Vue Flow 替代 litegraph.js), 但缺: (a) 即时 GPU 预览 (b) workflow JSON 分享 (只有 import-flow 路由) (c) 类型校验 onConnect (d) 200+ 第三方节点 (只有 200+ 自家算子)

key_capabilities: PromptTemplate / Memory / Agent / Tool / Retriever / Chain
world_benchmark_comparison.nanobot_status: capability_manager 6 大类 (openclaw/mcp/browser/search/monitor/ai) 是 LangFlow 的 5-6 倍广度, 但深度: 缺 streaming + chat UI preview + RAG 节点 + export to Python

world_benchmark_comparison.domain: 数据 pipeline 编排 (见 data_flow_linkage_diagnosis)
world_benchmark_comparison.nanobot_status: 已有 200+ operator (vs 300+) + dag_v2 7 NodeType, 缺 DAG view UI 完整 + XCom 跨 task 传参
无 deterministic workflow, 无 saga, 无 signal 通道

world_benchmark_comparison.domain: AI 模型 + cog 工作流
key_capabilities: Model = Docker + cog.yaml (可一键运行任意 ML 模型)
按调用秒数计费 (cog 冷启动 < 5s)
Workflow: 多 model 串/并 + Webhook
API 标准化 (输入/输出 schema 公开)
world_benchmark_comparison.nanobot_status: 有 Operator marketplace 但无 cog 类 Docker 化执行, 无按调用计费, 无冷启动优化, 无 API 标准化 (schema 有, 但 deployment 没有)
OperatorDef 已经有 semver + replaces + deprecated 字段, 但无 commit/PR/branch 工作流, 无 inference API serverless, 无 leaderboard/like/community, 无 Pro/Enterprise

recommendation_summary.headline_gap: 后端 3 套并行 capability 体系 (capability_manager 150+ / imdf/nodes 47 / dag_v2/operators 200+) 互不引用、execute handler 全部 None, 是 P0 级别的'虚胖能力市场'; 同一个 'GPT-4 LLM' 在三处叫三个名字 (openclaw_coding_agent / llm / op.scoring.gpt4); workflow service 8009 端口挂 5 个 router (workflow/templates/editor/dag_v2/director) 共 ~80 端点实装度参差; 前端 VisualEditor.vue (557 行) 完整对标 ComfyUI litegraph.js 拖拽体验, 但缺类型校验 onConnect + 即时 schema 表单 + 步骤级 WS 实时推送 + 模板市场; DirectorStudio (132 行) 是 1 个 brief → 8 shots → assets → final cut 的 demo, 实际生成是 mock。
top_3_p0_fixes: (1) 3 套 capability 合一: 单例 UnifiedCapabilityRegistry 接管 capability_manager 150+ + imdf/nodes 47 + dag_v2/operators 200+, 暴露 /api/v1/capabilities 统一列表 + alias map + 真 execute 路由 (P0: 当前 3 套都是 declarative, 没有真执行)

(2) NodeType.handler dispatch 真实化: 把 NodeType 7 个 (input/transform/condition/loop/parallel/sub_workflow/output) 各接一个真函数 (LLM 调 model_gateway / 数据走 dataset_service / 清洗走 cleaning_service / 采集走 collection_service); Operator marketplace 真正 bind 到各 microservice run() (P0: 当前 AdvancedDAGEngine.execute 是 stub, 跑了不出结果)

(3) 模板市场 3 套合并: imdf/nodes/templates 6 个 (t2i_basic / video_pipeline / ppt_auto / ai_prelabel / img_upscale / empty) + workflow_service/templates 完整 + dag_v2 visual templates, 统一 /api/v1/workflow/templates, VisualEditor 加 '模板库' Tab (P0: 3 套 template 互相独立, 用户找不到)
top_5_p1_enhancements: (1) Operator 版本化 + 灰度: 已有 semver/replaces/deprecated, 缺 publish/pin/diff 路由 + Replicate 风格按调用计费
(2) DAG 类型校验 onConnect: Vue Flow 边拖拽时 fetch operatorSchema 双向校验, 不兼容变红 + tooltip; 替换 textarea JSON 为自动生成 NForm
(3) Operator marketplace 评分 / 评论 / 排行: Hugging Face Hub Pro 风格 + leaderboard
(4) Director Studio 真实多模态生成: 接入 kling/runway/sora 视频 + TTS (ElevenLabs / OpenAI) + 字幕 (whisper) + BGM 选曲, 替换 mock URI
(5) DAG 实时运行可视化: WS /api/v1/workflow/dag/runs/{run_id}/ws 推 per-step 状态 + 日志; Gantt view + 耗时热力图

phase_roadmap.week_1_p0: 3 套 capability 合一 + 真 execute (capability_manager / imdf/nodes / dag_v2/operators → UnifiedCapabilityRegistry + handler dispatch)
phase_roadmap.week_2_p0: 模板市场 3 套合并 + VisualEditor '模板库' Tab + NodeType.handler 真实化
phase_roadmap.week_3_p1: Operator 版本化 (publish/pin/diff) + 评分 / 排行; onConnect 类型校验; NForm 自动生成
phase_roadmap.week_4_p1: Director Studio 真实多模态 (kling/TTS/whisper/BGM); DAG WS 实时 + Gantt
phase_roadmap.month_2_p2: 商业化 (pricing/license/billing); 跨 marketplace 联邦搜索 (Zapier / Hugging Face / Replicate)
